tool_args.label: Subcommittee approvals support M7 contract-term claim
tool_args.raw_text: this item was approved by both the MTA Joint Railroads subcommittee and MTA Board Finance subcommittee during meetings held on February 26, 2024

payload.description: Replacement for malformed has_timeline_event claim->event relation; the subcommittee approval event provides timeline context for the M7 contract-term claim.
